rule_metadata.author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: UAC Bypass Using Windows Media Player - File

rules.rule_text:
title: UAC Bypass Using Windows Media Player - File
id: 68578b43-65df-4f81-9a9b-92f32711a951
status: test
description: Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using Windows Media Player osksupport.dll
  (UACMe 32)
references:
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME
author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-08-23
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1548.002
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    TargetFilename|startswith: C:\Users\
    TargetFilename|endswith: \AppData\Local\Temp\OskSupport.dll
  selection2:
    Image: C:\Windows\system32\DllHost.exe
    TargetFilename: C:\Program Files\Windows Media Player\osk.exe
  condition: 1 of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
